title: 2025-07-29 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 7.28
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-07-29: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 7.28/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-07-29, the score printed 7.28/100 in the low regime, with volatility and front-end rate pressure doing most of the work.
